name: daybook
description: Daybook — a personal daily portal (Cloudflare Pages + D1 + Access).

scripts.db:init:local: wrangler d1 execute daybook --local --file=migrations/0001_core.sql && wrangler d1 execute daybook --local --file=migrations/0002_modules.sql
scripts.db:init:remote: wrangler d1 execute daybook --remote --file=migrations/0001_core.sql && wrangler d1 execute daybook --remote --file=migrations/0002_modules.sql
